claim_tested: A validated graph produced one locally playable proof video that a human repository owner could review, while narration and caption-layout defects remained visible.
limitations: The reviewed proof targets the earlier graph-video feasibility snapshot, not TEMPO commit 4afc6a3.
The repository owner reported severe electronic voice character and captions obscuring diagrams.
The observation supports existence and reviewability only; it does not show delivery quality, learner value, demand, or production readiness.
Grounding is supported by the bound local verification artifact and video hash, not by an external source audit.
One repository owner is not an independent learner sample.

measurements.metric: Grounded proof videos produced from a validated graph

provenance.collection_method: Repository-owner review of the hash-bound local proof video followed by direct feedback in the active Codex conversation.

sample_context.description: One human review of the existing local graph-to-video feasibility proof.
sample_context.population: Repository owner/developer; not an independent target learner.
